summary: Tested new karaoke word-by-word highlight feature and audio waveform indicator. All core karaoke features verified working: word highlighting (current/spoken/upcoming classes), animated waveform (5 bars), stop button, word progression during playback, and auto-speak on new AI messages.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/tts returns audio_base64 (7/7 pytest tests passed)
Backend: TTS handles Spanish characters correctly
Backend: TTS handles long text for karaoke
Frontend: Play button (data-testid='play-audio-{id}') triggers TTS fetch and karaoke playback
Frontend: Karaoke word highlighting - current word has green background (karaoke-word-current class)
Frontend: Karaoke word highlighting - upcoming words are dimmed at 35% opacity (karaoke-word-upcoming class)
Frontend: Karaoke word highlighting - spoken words return to normal color (karaoke-word-spoken class)
Frontend: Animated waveform (data-testid='audio-waveform') appears during playback with 5 animated bars
Frontend: Waveform bars animate with staggered delays (waveform-bar CSS animation)
Frontend: Stop button (data-testid='stop-audio-{id}') appears during playback
Frontend: Stop button click stops playback and returns to normal text rendering
Frontend: Play button reappears after stop
Frontend: Karaoke highlighting clears after stop
Frontend: Word index advances during playback (tested: 0 -> 4 words spoken in 2 seconds)
Frontend: Auto-speak karaoke activates on new AI message after sending text message
Frontend: Tool activity indicator shows during message processing
Frontend: Text input mode works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper separation of concerns with KaraokeText and AudioWaveform components
playAudioWithKaraoke utility properly calculates word timings weighted by character length
Cleanup on stop is handled correctly via audioControllerRef
CSS animations for waveform bars use appropriate staggered delays for natural appearance
seed_data_creation: Used existing Learning Spanish conversation for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Karaoke feature fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: 'play-audio-{messageId}' (play button on AI messages), 'stop-audio-{messageId}' (stop button during playback), 'audio-waveform' (animated waveform indicator). CSS classes: 'karaoke-word-current' (highlighted word with green bg), 'karaoke-word-spoken' (normal color), 'karaoke-word-upcoming' (35% opacity dimmed). 'waveform-bar' (animated bar elements). The playAudioWithKaraoke function in /app/frontend/src/lib/audio.js handles timing calculations based on audio duration and word character lengths. Auto-speak triggers via playWithKaraoke() after TTS response in handleSendText() and handleSendVoice().

audio_waveform.animation: waveform-bar 0.6s ease-in-out infinite with staggered delays

stop_button.on_click: Stops audio, clears karaoke, shows play button again

auto_speak.triggers_when: New AI message received (after text or voice send)

screenshots: karaoke_active.png - Shows karaoke highlighting in progress
karaoke_shorter_msg.png - Shows waveform and stop button during playback
karaoke_auto_speak.png - Shows auto-speak activated on new AI message

visual_verification.waveform_bars: Verified 5 animated bars visible during playback
visual_verification.stop_button: Verified Square icon appears instead of Volume2
visual_verification.word_progression: Verified word count increased from 0 to 4 over 2 seconds
